originalTitle: Wall St ends higher on cool inflation data, strong earnings
summary: STORY: U.S. stocks closed higher on Wednesday, with the Dow gaining more than a quarter of a percent, the S&P 500 adding over a third of a percent and the Nasdaq climbing more than six-tenths of a percent. A second day of solid bank earnings added momentum to an auspicious beginning to second-quarter reporting season. BlackRock and Morgan Stanley both beat quarterly profit expectations, with shares of BlackRock advancing over 6.5% and Morgan Stanley also ending higher. Strong earnings combined with more cooler-than-expected inflation data, in the form of June wholesale prices, helped lift stocks, says Melissa Brown, managing director of investment decision research at SimCorp. "We saw some good earnings from the financial companies. And, you know, on top of that, there's just still the same buzz around the AI trade, around what's happening with semiconductors. And there's, we haven't really seen a lot of bad news. The inflation news has been better than expected, although I would argue still not good. So inflation is still higher than the Fed's target, even though it has come in a little bit lower than expected. But I think, you know, kind of all those things are conspiring to make it a good but not blowout day today." Among the session's other stock moves, PayPal surged more than 17% after sources told Reuters that Stripe and private equity firm Advent International have jointly offered to acquire it. And shares of United Airlines dipped in extended trading despite the carrier saying it expected full-year profit at the high end of its prior forecast, as the company's third-quarter outlook was short of Wall Street expectations.
content: STORY: U.S. stocks closed higher on Wednesday, with the Dow gaining more than a quarter of a percent, the S&P 500 adding over a third of a percent and the Nasdaq climbing more than six-tenths of a percent. A second day of solid bank earnings added momentum to an auspicious beginning to second-quarter reporting season. BlackRock and Morgan Stanley both beat quarterly profit expectations, with shares of BlackRock advancing over 6.5% and Morgan Stanley also ending higher. Strong earnings combined with more cooler-than-expected inflation data, in the form of June wholesale prices, helped lift stocks, says Melissa Brown, managing director of investment decision research at SimCorp. "We saw some good earnings from the financial companies. And, you know, on top of that, there's just still the same buzz around the AI trade, around what's happening with semiconductors. And there's, we haven't really seen a lot of bad news. The inflation news has been better than expected, although I would argue still not good. So inflation is still higher than the Fed's target, even though it has come in a little bit lower than expected. But I think, you know, kind of all those things are conspiring to make it a good but not blowout day today." Among the session's other stock moves, PayPal surged more than 17% after sources told Reuters that Stripe and private equity firm Advent International have jointly offered to acquire it. And shares of United Airlines dipped in extended trading despite the carrier saying it expected full-year profit at the high end of its prior forecast, as the company's third-quarter outlook was short of Wall Street expectations.
chineseTitle: 通胀数据温和、盈利强劲，华尔街收高
chineseSummary: 故事：美国股市周三收高，道琼斯指数上涨逾四分之一，标准普尔 500 指数上涨逾三分之一，纳斯达克指数上涨逾十分之六。第二天稳健的银行盈利为第二季度财报季的良好开局增添了动力。贝莱德和摩根士丹利的季度利润均超出预期，贝莱德股价上涨超过 6.5%，摩根士丹利也收高。 SimCorp 投资决策研究董事总经理梅丽莎·布朗 (Melissa Brown) 表示，强劲的盈利加上 6 月份批发价格等低于预期的通胀数据，帮助提振了股市。 “我们看到金融公司获得了一些不错的收益。而且，你知道，最重要的是，围绕人工智能贸易、半导体的情况仍然存在同样的嗡嗡声。而且，我们还没有真正看到很多坏消息。通胀消息好于预期，尽管我认为仍然不好。因此，通胀仍然高于美联储的目标，尽管它比预期低了一点。但我认为，你知道，所有这些事情都在某种程度上共同努力让今天成为美好的一天，但不是井喷的一天。”消息人士告诉路透社，Stripe 和私募股权公司 Advent International 已联合提出收购 PayPal，该交易日的其他股价走势中，PayPal 股价飙升超过 17%。尽管联合航空表示，由于该公司第三季度前景低于华尔街预期，预计全年利润将达到先前预测的上限，但该公司股价在延长交易中下跌。
chineseContent: 故事：美国股市周三收高，道琼斯指数上涨逾四分之一，标准普尔 500 指数上涨逾三分之一，纳斯达克指数上涨逾十分之六。第二天稳健的银行盈利为第二季度财报季的良好开局增添了动力。贝莱德和摩根士丹利的季度利润均超出预期，贝莱德股价上涨超过 6.5%，摩根士丹利也收高。 SimCorp 投资决策研究董事总经理梅丽莎·布朗 (Melissa Brown) 表示，强劲的盈利加上 6 月份批发价格等低于预期的通胀数据，帮助提振了股市。 “我们看到金融公司获得了一些不错的收益。而且，你知道，最重要的是，围绕人工智能贸易、半导体的情况仍然存在同样的嗡嗡声。而且，我们还没有真正看到很多坏消息。通胀消息好于预期，尽管我认为仍然不好。因此，通胀仍然高于美联储的目标，尽管它比预期低了一点。但我认为，你知道，所有这些事情都在某种程度上共同努力让今天成为美好的一天，但不是井喷的一天。”消息人士告诉路透社，Stripe 和私募股权公司 Advent International 已联合提出收购 PayPal，该交易日的其他股价走势中，PayPal 股价飙升超过 17%。尽管联合航空表示，由于该公司第三季度前景低于华尔街预期，预计全年利润将达到先前预测的上限，但该公司股价在延长交易中下跌。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
